revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:別府八湯温泉まつり]]
'''Beppu Hatto Onsen Festival''' (別府八湯温泉まつり) is a festival held in [[:en:Oita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]], [[:en:Beppu, Ōita|Beppu City]],<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=5624bdbc61daeabd9bc3704c5a5e468141ac37c615911b4f8e169bf49ee61646JmltdHM9MTc0MTk5NjgwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=257a6f27-e8f4-6831-00fa-7a97e9c0697b&psq=Beppu+Hatto+Onsen+Festival&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9lbmpveW9uc2VuLmNpdHkuYmVwcHUtanAuY29tL3NpZ2h0c2VlaW5nL29uc2VuZmVzdGl2YWwv&ntb=1</ref> every year on April 1st, the Day of Onsen Appreciation<ref>{{Cite book|和書 |title=泉都別府の祭りと民俗 |date=2016-06-23 |publisher=おおいたインフォメーションハウス |page=20 |author=小玉 洋美 |isbn=9784907112073|qq=}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|和書 |title=大分祭事記 |date=1981-2-15 |publisher=アドバンス大分 |page=144 |author=松岡実|qq=}}</ref>, and during the first weekend of April. The festival expresses gratitude for the abundant hot spring blessings of [[Beppu Onsen#Hot spring areas (Beppu Hatto)|Beppu Hatto]]. For three days starting from April 1st, over 100 {{ill|communal hot springs|ja|共同温泉|1=Communal hot springs|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/communal hot springs|13=User:Immanuelle/Communal hot springs|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 共同浴場}} in the city are opened to the public for free. A mikoshi from {{ill|Onsen Shrine (Beppu, Aoyama Town)|ja|温泉神社 (別府市青山町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onsen Shrine (Beppu, Aoyama Town)|1=Onsen Shrine (Beppu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11562964}} parades through the shopping streets. Those newly certified as "Onsen Masters" in the past year under {{ill|Beppu Hatto Onsen Road|ja|別府八湯温泉道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Hatto Onsen Road|1=Beppu Hatto Onsen Road|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396699}} are honored. The flames of '''{{ill|Oniyama Fire Festival|ja|扇山火まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oniyama Fire Festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大平山 (大分県)|1=Mount Ōhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11435282}}''' set the evening sky ablaze at {{ill|Ōhirayama (Ōita Prefecture)|ja|大平山 (大分県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōhirayama (Ōita Prefecture)|1=Mount Ōhira|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11435282}}, marking a festival full of events to celebrate the start of the new fiscal year. On the final day, the "Yu~You~Parade" is held in the city center. This grand parade features a mikoshi procession led by Yayoi Tengu, marching bands from universities in Beppu, the {{ill|Beppu Fire Department Headquarters|ja|別府市消防本部|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Fire Department Headquarters|1=Beppu Fire Department Headquarters|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396714}}, {{ill|Beppu Police Station|ja|別府警察署|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Police Station|1=Beppu Police Station|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396744}}, the Japan Ground Self-Defense Force {{ill|Beppu Garrison|ja|別府駐屯地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Garrison|1=Beppu Garrison|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396752}} ({{ill|41st Infantry Regiment (Japan)|ja|第41普通科連隊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/41st Infantry Regiment (Japan)|1=JGSDF 41st Infantry Regiment|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11601169}}), {{ill|Kyushu Natural Animal Park African Safari|en|Kyushu Natural Animal Park African Safari|qid=Q11370332|lt=Kyushu Natural Zoological Park African Safari|1=Kyushu Natural Animal Park African Safari}}, and a celebratory ride by Harley enthusiasts. Various major institutions and organizations within Beppu take part in this vibrant event. == References == {{reflist|qq=}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Beppu Hatto Onsen HakuRankai|ja|別府八湯温泉泊覧会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Beppu Hatto Onsen HakuRankai|1=Beppu Hatto Onsen HakuRankai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11396698}} * {{ill|Beppu Onsen|en|Beppu Onsen|qid=Q4890932|lt=Beppu Onsen|1=Beppu Onsen}} == External Links == * [http://beppu-event.jp/onsenmatsuri/ Official Beppu Hatto Onsen Festival Website] {{translated page|ja|別府八湯温泉まつり|version=102905292|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:別府八湯温泉まつり]]
